settings.title: Framework Settings
settings.not_configured: Framework is not fully configured. Fill in and save the required sections below.

appearance.hero_lede: Govern the shared shell theme policy, locked presets, branding assets and PDF document identity.
appearance.runtime_description: Logos, favicon, document identity and PDF watermark settings remain separate from the interactive theme policy.

policy.title: Theme Customizer access
policy.description: Choose whether users control their shell preferences or receive one locked platform theme.
policy.allow_customizer: Allow users to open Theme Customizer
policy.enabled_summary: Users can open Theme Customizer and keep local preferences.
policy.locked_summary: Users receive the locked platform theme.
policy.disabled_description: theme controls are hidden and Catalyst applies the selected platform configuration to every user.

locked.title: Platform theme configuration
locked.description: Uses the shared shell configuration model. Closed themes preserve their contrast-safe combinations.

fields.logo_primary_help: Empty = use the neutral Catalyst/Inspinia logo.
fields.logo_dark_help: Used whenever the resolved variant is dark.
fields.favicon_help: Rendered in the shared head assets for the full platform.

messages.invalid_theme: Select the canonical Catalyst/Inspinia branding preset.
messages.invalid_watermark_color: PDF watermark color must be a hex value like #CBD5E1.

feature_flags.title: Feature Flags
feature_flags.hero_lede: Environment and module defaults, role or user overrides, and coherent runtime evaluation.

catalog.title: Default catalog
catalog.description: Canonical surface for defaults persisted in features.json and read-only flags inherited from the current runtime.

project_config.label: Project configured
project_config.description: Read-only setup completion state owned by app.json.

cache_enabled.label: Cache enabled
cache_enabled.description: Read-only cache activation owned by cache.json.

route_cache.label: Route cache
route_cache.description: Read-only route cache flag owned by cache.json.

websocket_enabled.label: WebSocket runtime
websocket_enabled.description: Read-only WebSocket boot flag owned by websocket.json.

mfa.label: MFA
mfa.description: Enable MFA setup and challenge surfaces for session authentication.

auth_registration_enabled.label: Public registration
auth_registration_enabled.description: Enable public self-service account registration routes and login links.

notifications.label: Notifications
notifications.description: Enable authenticated notification endpoints and unread counters.

social_auth.label: Social auth
social_auth.description: Enable OAuth entry and callback routes when providers are configured.

module_framework_apiplatform.label: API Platform module
module_framework_apiplatform.description: Load the versioned API admin and bearer-token runtime surfaces.

module_framework_audit.label: Audit module
module_framework_audit.description: Load audit trails and operational evidence surfaces.

module_framework_automation.label: Automation module
module_framework_automation.description: Load internal automation rules, logs and workflow triggers.

module_framework_devtools.label: DevTools module
module_framework_devtools.description: Load technical smoke and module designer surfaces.

module_framework_documents.label: Documents module
module_framework_documents.description: Load document templates, preview and export surfaces.

module_framework_media.label: Media module
module_framework_media.description: Load reusable media library and metadata field surfaces.

module_framework_notification.label: Notification module
module_framework_notification.description: Load authenticated notification APIs and websocket token issuance.

overrides.title: Targeted overrides
overrides.description: Real persistence by role or user, audited and evaluated at runtime.

empty.title: No overrides yet
empty.description: Flags are currently running only with their environment and module defaults.

overrides.search_placeholder: Search by flag, subject or note

form.title: Create override
form.description: Apply a real exception by role or user over a mutable feature flag.

fields.enabled_help: Checked = force enabled for this subject. Unchecked = force disabled.

messages.invalid_flag: The feature flag key is invalid.
messages.invalid_id: The feature flag override identifier is invalid.
messages.read_only_default: This feature flag is owned by another runtime config and is read-only here.
messages.read_only_override: Read-only flags cannot receive actor overrides.
messages.persistence_failed: The feature flag change could not be saved. Review the platform logs.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.hero_lede: Formal plugin manifests, controlled runtime loading and real adoption in registries, inspectors and harness.
plugins.boundary_body: The runtime only loads modules when their plugin is enabled and their module.* flag remains active. The technical contract is centralized in boot-core/plugins/*.php, PluginRegistry, PluginManager and ModuleRegistry.

grid.title: Plugin catalog
grid.description: Formal manifests, controlled loading and real adoption by module.

empty.title: No plugins registered
empty.description: No plugin manifests were discovered under boot-core/plugins.

grid.search_placeholder: Search by key, label or module

messages.invalid_manifest: The plugin manifest is invalid and cannot be activated.
messages.required: This plugin is required and its state cannot be changed.
messages.persistence_failed: The plugin state could not be saved. Review the platform logs.

messages.dkim_generated: DKIM keys generated. Copy the DNS record below.
messages.save_error: Could not save settings. Please check the form.
messages.ftp_pretest_success_cleanup_warning: Remote upload succeeded, but the cleanup step needs manual review.

validation.secondary_entry_required: Secondary entry point is required for User Access.
validation.language_invalid: Language must exist in the localization catalogs managed from Administration.

dkim.description: Generate an RSA 2048-bit key pair for DKIM email authentication. After generation, add the DNS record to your domain.
dkim.card_description: Generate RSA-2048 DKIM keys for your mail domain. Keys are stored in
dkim.record_help: Add this record to your DNS zone.

notices.ftp: Maintained runtime surface for future deployment inclusion. Credentials can be stored here and the upload pretest validates live FTP, FTPS or SFTP connectivity, even though no downstream deployment consumer is attached yet.
notices.cache_runtime: Cache is configured only from this panel. Runtime consumption is allowed only when the real environment is production and the cache master switch is enabled here.
notices.cache_locked: Cache is locked in this environment. You can inspect the settings, but activation is blocked outside production.
notices.devtools: Maintained compatibility surface for future inclusion. Today it mirrors runtime debug mode and display logs from Application and Logging only.
notices.features: Base capability switches for this installation. Advanced runtime overrides still live under Feature Flags after setup.

labels.name: Name
labels.enable_mfa_routes: Enable MFA setup and challenge routes

hints.environment_readonly: Resolved during early bootstrap from the active environment and shown here as read-only.
hints.ftp_root: Use / for the login root or point to a writable subdirectory.
hints.session_connection: Named DB connection from db.json when using the database driver.
hints.cache_prefix: Used for namespacing file-backed application cache artifacts.
hints.bcrypt_rounds: Higher = more secure but slower. Default: 12.
hints.allowed_origins: Use * for any origin, or list specific domains.
hints.log_max_file_size_mb: When a log file exceeds this size, it is automatically rotated. Platform guardrail: 1-50 MB.
hints.log_max_rotated_files: Maximum historical files kept for each log. Platform guardrail: 1-10 files.

alerts.ftp_pretest: Use Pretest Upload to validate the saved credentials against a real remote endpoint before wiring this surface into a deploy flow.
alerts.cache_supported_activation: This is the only supported activation path for framework cache. Runtime consumption still depends on the production environment and the master switch below.
alerts.cache_blocked_outside_production: Cache activation is blocked outside production. The backend will also reject any attempt to enable these flags from non-production environments.
alerts.devtools_compatibility: Maintained compatibility surface for future inclusion. Changes here mirror Application debug mode and Logging display logs only. Cache activation lives exclusively in Cache & Routes.
alerts.features_setup: These switches write the installation defaults in features.json. Use Feature Flags later for role or user overrides.

completion.title: Finalize Configuration
completion.description: When all sections above are correctly saved and the database is reachable, mark the framework as configured. This step is only allowed after an active administrator account already exists.
completion.admin_setup_description: Before finalizing the setup, create the initial active administrator account. This step provisions the account only; it does not mark the framework as configured.
completion.admin_hint: Choose your own credentials. They are stored hashed (bcrypt) and never printed in logs.
completion.admin_create_success: Administrator account created. You can finalize the setup now.
completion.admin_exists_description: An active administrator account already exists. You can finalize the setup now.
completion.admin_exists_success: Administrator account already exists. You can finalize the setup now.
completion.finalize_requires_admin: Create an active administrator account before finalizing the framework configuration.
completion.reset_description: Re-opens the finalization wizard. Existing config values are preserved — only the 'configured' flag is cleared. Use this if you need to re-run setup or create a new administrator account.

errors.app_json_missing: app.json is missing — save the Application section first.
errors.db_json_missing: db.json is missing — save the Database section first.
errors.db_incomplete: Database configuration is incomplete. Fill at least host, database, username.
errors.db_unreachable: Cannot connect to the database with the saved credentials.
errors.users_table_missing: The 'users' table does not exist in the configured database. Run the migration scripts first.
errors.auth_tables_missing: The setup-required authentication tables are missing in the configured database.
errors.admin_create_failed: Could not create the administrator account.
errors.admin_required: Finalize is blocked until an active administrator account exists.
errors.admin_email_exists: A user with this email address already exists.

endpoints.title: Health Endpoints
endpoints.description: Public probes stay available for automation. The panel reuses the same report as `status`.

details.form_state_bridge: old input + validation errors available for HTML flows
details.ftp_only_available: FTP available, FTPS missing in this runtime
details.redactor_present: shared sanitizer used by config:show and logger context
details.secret_store_isolated: managed secret keys isolated in secrets.json
details.secret_store_missing_no_leaks: no secret store file yet; no public secret leaks detected
details.public_secrets_leak: public JSON still contains managed secrets: :keys
details.login_throttle_dev: bypassed in development; enforced in non-development
details.request_throttle_dev: generic mutating-request throttle is bypassed in development

overview.description: Compact control surface for the framework bootstrap, runtime services and operational readiness.

foundation.title: Foundation
foundation.description: Application identity, database and outbound mail baseline.

runtime.title: Session, cache and realtime
runtime.description: Request persistence, cache activation and WebSocket endpoint values.

security.title: Security and access boundaries
security.description: Authentication hardening, CORS and DKIM generation surfaces.

operations.title: Operations and diagnostics
operations.description: Deployment credentials, logging behavior and development mirrors.
